chunks.title: Profile & Summary
chunks.content: Naser Al Noman is a Computer Science graduate with a strong sense of ownership and a proven ability to learn and adapt quickly. He is skilled in deriving optimal solutions through research, experimentation, and analytical thinking. Known for professionalism, clear communication, and independent project execution. He is passionate about advancing software quality through rigorous testing and intelligent automation, applying AI-assisted methods to enhance accuracy, coverage, and overall development efficiency.

chunks.title: Contact Information
chunks.content: Naser Al Noman can be contacted by email at nasernoman277@gmail.com or by phone at +880 1940957688. His LinkedIn profile is at https://www.linkedin.com/in/naser-al-noman/ and his GitHub is at https://github.com/Naser-Al-Noman. His portfolio website is at https://naser-al-noman.github.io/. He is based in Mirpur-2, Dhaka-1216, Bangladesh.

chunks.title: SJ Innovation LLC – Software Quality Assurance Engineer (Trainee)
chunks.content: Naser worked as a Software Quality Assurance Engineer (Trainee) at SJ Innovation LLC from November 2025 to present (current role), based in Dhaka, Bangladesh. Responsibilities included: developing and executing manual and automated test cases for web and API-based applications; collaborating with developers to identify, document, and resolve software defects; automating tests using Playwright; contributing to test documentation, reporting, and continuous improvement of QA workflows.

chunks.title: Mongol Tori – Research & Documentation, AI & Autonomous Subteam
chunks.content: Naser worked in the Research & Documentation role on the AI & Autonomous Subteam at Mongol Tori from October 2022 to December 2024, based in Dhaka, Bangladesh. He contributed to test planning and validation of AI models and autonomous navigation logic, identifying performance issues and documenting test outcomes. He collected and analyzed performance data from rover sensors to improve autonomous navigation. He implemented data-driven decision logic using Python and ROS for object detection, and maintained versioned datasets and documented insights for the research team.

chunks.title: BRACU Express – Sports Journalist & Editor
chunks.content: Naser worked as a Sports Journalist & Editor at BRACU Express from June 2021 to November 2023, based in Dhaka, Bangladesh. He conducted interviews and gathered qualitative data for publication, enhancing reporting accuracy. He analyzed readership trends using Excel to track article engagement metrics, and collaborated with a diverse editorial team, developing strong communication and presentation skills for client-facing tasks.

chunks.title: Technical Skills
chunks.content: Programming: Python (Flask, Django), JavaScript. QA Practices: Test Case Design, Regression Testing, Bug Tracking. Testing Tools: Selenium, Postman, Cypress, Playwright, JMeter. Data Analysis & Visualization: Power BI, Excel (Pivot Tables, Macros), Google Sheets, Matplotlib. Web Development: HTML, CSS, Node.js, Django, Flask. Database Management: SQL (MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB), Query Optimization, Data Cleaning. Version Control: Git, GitHub. Other: LaTeX, Arduino.

chunks.title: Education
chunks.content: Naser Al Noman completed his Bachelor of Science in Computer Science (CSE) from BRAC University, Dhaka, Bangladesh, from June 2021 to October 2025, graduating with a CGPA of 3.51. Prior to that, he completed his Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) at Mirpur Cantonment Public School & College from July 2018 to December 2020, achieving a GPA of 5.00.

chunks.title: Achievements
chunks.content: Naser's achievements include: 1st Runner Up at the NASA Space Apps Challenge 2022 (Dhaka Region), where he built a web-based space data visualization platform displaying stellar variability and 3D planetary models using real scientific datasets; 3rd place in the Math Olympiad at BAGHC in 2017; 3rd place in the Science Project competition at BAGHC in 2017.

chunks.title: Personal & Academic Projects
chunks.content: 1. Shopping Ecommerce Site (React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS): A modern, full-featured ecommerce web application showcasing best practices in frontend development and UI design. Implemented product listing, cart, checkout, and wishlist functionalities with responsive, modular components. Created administrative dashboards to visualize donor availability and system performance. 2. Blood Services (HTML, CSS, Python, Flask, SQLite): Rebuilt an existing database system for performance optimization and secure data handling. Applied SQL queries for tracking donor activity and generating summary reports. Integrated encryption (bcrypt) to maintain data privacy and integrity. 3. Stock Prediction using Machine Learning (Python, Scikit-learn): Integrated Flask to deploy an interactive web interface for real-time stock prediction visualization. Implemented data preprocessing, feature extraction, and model training pipelines with Scikit-learn. 4. Recipe Blog Site (Node.js, Express, EJS, MongoDB, JavaScript, CSS): Implemented RESTful APIs for recipe CRUD operations and category-based filtering. Integrated MongoDB for storing recipes, ingredients, instructions, and user ratings.
